flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Iowa State University rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($25.4k → $28.9k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Iowa State University rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($9.6k → $10.8k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Iowa State University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.7% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Iowa State University rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 (50.8% → 56.7%).
